content.text:
Render a wide horizontal subject that fills the frame left-to-right with thin margins top and bottom. Style: bold flat 2D character sprite designed to remain readable at very low resolutions (32-64 pixels). Use large areas of solid color with clear boundaries - no gradients, no photorealistic shading, no fine textures. Strong recognizable silhouette against a solid cyan #00FFFF background. The background must be one uniform color fill - no gradient, no shading, no shadow cast on the background, no texture. Only the background pixels use this color; the subject should not contain this color. Thick dark outlines defining the form. Limited distinctive color palette. Center the full-body subject, front-facing or 3/4 view, filling most of the frame. Square aspect ratio. No text, no logos, no watermarks.

Subject: Create exactly one horizontal transparent sprite sheet, 384x64 pixels, divided conceptually into six equal 64x64 cells but draw no cell borders. Each cell contains one LARGE centered animal-head pictogram, not a person: bear head, ox head with horns, crane head and neck, swallow bird silhouette, coiled snake head/body mark, eagle head. Every animal fills most of its 64x64 cell, about 44-54 pixels tall, with 2-4 pixels safe padding. Bold simple game UI icons, strong readable silhouette, 1-2 pixel dark ink outline, 2-3 VINIK24 colors, no humans, no full-body fighters, no extra animals, no labels, no grid, no dividers.
